resources.string: Continue your activity on your computer
Easily continue anything you\'re doing to your computer!. \nRead more below.

Tap your camera cutout to instantly continue browsing your current page on your computer. 

To make this feature work, you need to: 
1. Enable this accessibility service. 
2. Enable the "Display over other apps" permission in settings. 
3. Install the FOSS QoL Companion extension on Firefox. 

The app needs this permission to be able to detect the camera tap, what webpage you're currently on, and where on that page you are. 

Want to see exactly how it works? Check out the source code on https://github.com/lukassobotik/foss-qol.
